description_long: This is a single slip-on shoe with a vibrant magenta upper and a white rubber sole. The upper material appears to be a textured fabric, possibly canvas, with a slightly worn and uneven surface, especially near the toe area. The shoe has a low-cut design with no visible laces or fasteners, and the opening is wide for easy foot entry. The interior lining is a darker shade of purple, and the heel features a vertical seam for structural support. The sole is flat and thin, suitable for casual walking on urban surfaces. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A magenta slip-on shoe with a textured fabric upper and a white flat sole, showing signs of light wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the magenta upper and white sole, with visible texture and slight wear near the toe.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the vertical seam at the heel and the open entry, with the sole's edge visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shoe's profile, magenta fabric, and clean lines of the upper and sole.
description_view_3: Front view showing the rounded toe, textured upper, and the wide opening for foot entry.
